title: aspilia helianthoides
intro: Aspilia helianthoides, also known as African spear grass or aspilia, is a tropical plant species native to Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. Aspilia helianthoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
